case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE RUSSELL DZUL TUZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $615.79 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT TUZ, JOSE RUSSELL DZUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT JOSE RUSSELL DZUL TUZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED MAR-31-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TUZ, JOSE RUSSELL DZUL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUZ, JOSE RUSSELL DZUL $615.79 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $700.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 5/11/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
